uplink.description: Status report with vibration events (WorkCount 18489621, battery 3.0 V)
uplink._note: Upstream example input; expected authored from reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt byte 30/10 = 3.0 V, WorkCount = bytes[4..7] big-endian = 0x011A2115 = 18489621). count != 0 => detected true.
Synthetic zero-count frame to cover action.motion.detected=false. Battery 36/10 = 3.6 V; WorkCount 0 => detected false.

uplink.description: Status report with low-battery flag set (high bit of Volt byte)
uplink._note: Synthetic frame: Volt byte 158 = 0x9E, high bit set => lowBattery extra; masked value 0x1E=30 -> 3.0 V. WorkCount 7 => detected true.

uplink.description: Startup version/device-info frame (reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example input; bytes[2]==0x00 is the version/datecode frame, not a measurement -> error.

uplink.description: Config-report response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example input; fPort 7 is config response, not a data report -> error.
